char_overview: Intelligence gatherer and spy for 狩灵协会4科 with sharp wit and a concealed past tied to her 牵丝 ability.
char_looks: Long purple hair, loosely tied at nape. Purple, sharp and appraising eyes. White loose shirt, black suit jacket, black casual pants, sneakers. None. Combat relies entirely on 牵丝 灵力回路.
char_traits: Gossip lover, Sharp-witted, Secretive, Highly adaptable
char_flaws: Operates independently, rarely shares full picture. Physical combat skills have atrophied from over-reliance on 牵丝.
char_abilities: 灵力回路-牵丝: Projects 灵力 as thin resilient threads for tracking, monitoring, restricting movement, and cutting. Can anchor to surfaces for silent traversal.
char_mission: Intelligence gathering officially; keeping her past hidden unofficially.
